name: Fruity Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the tomatoes and lemon juice until smooth.
2. Stir in the vegetable stock and season with salt and pepper.
3. Stir in the remaining vegetables and fruits.
4. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour to allow the flavors to blend.
5. Just before serving, stir in the parsley.
6. Serve with oatcakes.
